name: Fidelity Federal Savings and Loan Association of Delaware
description_short: Community-focused savings and loan association in Delaware, Ohio, offering personal and business banking, mortgages, and lending services since 1887.
description_long: Fidelity Federal Savings and Loan Association of Delaware has operated continuously since 1887, making it one of the oldest savings and loan associations in Ohio and the oldest continually operating business on Sandusky Street in Delaware, Ohio. The institution positions itself as a relationship-driven alternative to large impersonal banks, emphasizing individualized service and community connection. The company offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, credit cards, IRAs, CDs, debit cards, and online banking services. On the lending side, they provide mortgage loans, business checking and lending products, and facilitate personal lending through scheduled appointments with their lending team. They maintain a routing number (244170880) and operate an ATM network, with digital services available through their mobile app and online banking platform. Fidelity Federal distinguishes itself through its community involvement via the FidFed Cares program, a monthly charitable giving initiative where employees select local charities to support ($22,000 donated as of the website snapshot). The institution emphasizes personalized service, with customer testimonials highlighting staff familiarity, name recognition, and ease of local banking relationships. Their content marketing includes financial literacy resources covering credit scores, budgeting, banking basics, and real estate guidance. As a regional savings and loan institution, Fidelity Federal serves a local market but lacks the extensive service infrastructure, technology capabilities, and product breadth of larger national banks. Customers seeking specialized financial products, extensive branch networks, or advanced fintech solutions may find limitations. The institution's strength lies in relationship-based banking for local Delaware, Ohio residents who value personalized service and community ties over cutting-edge digital banking features.
services: Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinance
pros: Long institutional history since 1887 providing stability and deep community roots
Personalized service model where staff call customers by name and recognize regulars
Community investment through FidFed Cares monthly charitable giving program
Comprehensive banking products including checking, savings, CDs, credit cards, IRAs, and mortgages
Mobile app and online banking available for digital convenience
Local mortgage lending with dedicated lenders available by appointment
Strong customer loyalty with multi-generational banking relationships documented
cons: Limited to Delaware, Ohio geographic market with no indication of expansion or national presence
No published deposit rates or APY information on website for rate comparison
No mention of FDIC insurance details, safety ratings, or regulatory oversight information
Likely limited technology and digital innovation compared to national banks and neobanks
Business lending and mortgage options appear to require in-person appointments with no online application tools visible
best_for: Delaware, Ohio residents seeking relationship-based community banking with personalized service
Long-term customers prioritizing staff familiarity and local decision-making over national bank anonymity
Small business owners in the area needing local lending relationships and business banking
Homebuyers in the region looking for local mortgage lenders with community ties
diagnosis: Fidelity Federal is best suited for Delaware, Ohio residents and business owners who value personalized, relationship-driven banking and community involvement over the broad product selection and digital innovation of larger institutions. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to a single local market and lack of competitive rate transparency, making comparison shopping difficult for rate-sensitive customers.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: Fidelity Federal Savings and Loan Association of Delaware
